mapper.select:
select H.DEMPYO_NO as dempyoNo , H.SHINSEI_NO as shinseiNo , H.SHONINJO_KBN as shoninJokyoKbn , case H.SHONINJO_KBN when '${SHONINJO_KBN_MISHUSEI}' then '未処理' when '${SHONINJO_KBN_SASHIMODOSHI}' then '差戻し' when '${SHONINJO_KBN_SHITAGAKI_HOZON}' then '下書き保存' when '${SHONINJO_KBN_SHONINIRAICHU}' then '承認依頼中' when '${SHONINJO_KBN_SHONINZUMI}' then '承認済み' else H.SHONINJO_KBN end as shoninJokyo , H.KOSHINBI as koshinbi , H.KEIRBI as keiribi , H.KOSHINSHA as koshinsha , H.SHIKYUBI as shikyubi , H.NYURYOKU_KBN as nyuryokuKbnCd , H.HAITA_CNT as haitaCnt , H.DEMPYO_NO_KYUYO_KOJO as dempyoNoKyuyoKojo , H.SHINSEI_NO_KYUYO_KOJO as shinseiNoKyuyoKojo , H.HAITA_CNT_KYUYO_KOJO as haitaCntKyuyoKojo , (select count(1) from DAC213_JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU M where M.SHIKYUBI = H.SHIKYUBI and M.NYURYOKU_KBN = H.NYURYOKU_KBN) as rendoDataSokensu , (select count(1) from DAC213_JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU M where M.SHIKYUBI = H.SHIKYUBI and M.NYURYOKU_KBN = H.NYURYOKU_KBN and M.SHUSEI_FLG = '1') as shuseiSokensu from DAA301_JINKENHI_RENDO_JOHO_HEADER H where H.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}'
and H.SHIKYUBI >= #{taishoNengetsuFrom}
and H.SHIKYUBI <= #{taishoNengetsuTo}
and H.SHONINJO_KBN in
'${SHONINJO_KBN_MISHUSEI}'
,'${SHONINJO_KBN_SASHIMODOSHI}'
,'${SHONINJO_KBN_SHITAGAKI_HOZON}'
,'${SHONINJO_KBN_SHONINIRAICHU}'
,'${SHONINJO_KBN_SHONINZUMI}'
order by H.SHIKYUBI desc , H.NYURYOKU_KBN asc

select H.SHIKYUBI as shikyubi , H.TENPU_FILE_ID_1 as tenpuFileId1 , H.TENPU_FILE_ID_2 as tenpuFileId2 , H.TENPU_FILE_ID_3 as tenpuFileId3 , H.TENPU_FILE_SUU as tenpuFileSuu , H.SANSHO_URL as sanshoUrl , H.HAITA_CNT as haitaCnt , H.HAITA_CNT_KYUYO_KOJO as haitaCntKyuyoKojo from DAA301_JINKENHI_RENDO_JOHO_HEADER H where H.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' and H.DEMPYO_NO = #{dempyoNo}

select max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1010' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuKihonKyu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuKihonKyuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1020' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuSeikatsuHoshoKyu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuSeikatsuhoshoKyuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1030' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuShokiKyu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuShokiKyuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1040' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuNinchiShoreiFu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuNinchiShoreiFuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1050' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuShokunoCateShoreiFu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1050' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuShokunoCateShoreiFuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1060' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoKinmu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1060' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoKinmuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1070' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoTokubetsuKinmu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1070' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoTokubetsuKinmuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1080' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuTsukinkotsuHi , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1080' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuTsukinkotsuHiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1090' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuSonotaTeate , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1090' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuSonotaTeateHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1100' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoShikyuZangyo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1100' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoShikyuZangyoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2010' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKenkoHokenryo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKenkoHokenryoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2020' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKaigoHokenryo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKaigoHokenryoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2030' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKoseiNenkinHokenryo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKoseiNenkinHokenryoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2040' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKoyoHokenryo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKoyoHokenryoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2050' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHoken , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2050' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHokenHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2060' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoShotokuZei , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2060' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoShotokuZeiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2070' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoJuminZei , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2070' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoJuminZeiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2080' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHokenTaseiChu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2080' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHokenTaseiChuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2090' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKyosai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2090' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKyosaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2100' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoRodoKumiai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2100' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoRodoKumiaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2110' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoJutakuKashitsukekinHenkai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2110' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoJutakuKashitsukekinHenkaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2120' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoTanshinfuninHiyo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2120' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoTanshinfuninHiyoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2130' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoSenryoShohi , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2130' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoSenryoShohiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2140' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoHonkaiJutakuKashitsukekinhenkai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2140' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoHonkaiJutakuKashitsukekinHenkaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2150' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoFukushiKikin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2150' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoFukushiKikinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2160' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2160' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2170' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan1 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2170' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan1HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2180' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan2 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2180' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan2HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2190' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan3 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2190' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan3HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2200' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan4 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2200' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan4HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2210' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan5 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2210' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan5HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2220' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan6 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2220' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan6HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2230' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoGaibuZaisanKeiseiKakekin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2230' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoGaibuZaisanKeiseiKakekinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2240' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoShoreikin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2240' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoShoreikinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2250' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoKyuyoKashitsuke , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2250' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoKyuyoKashitsukeHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2260' then M.KINGAKU end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojoSub , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2260' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojoSubHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3010' then M.KINGAKU end) as sashihikiShiharaiGaku , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as sashihikiShiharaiGakuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3020' then M.KINGAKU end) as sashihikiSonotaShiharai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as sashihikiSonotaShiharaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3030' then M.KINGAKU end) as sashihikiFurikomiGaku , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as sashihikiFurikomiGakuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3040' then M.KINGAKU end) as sashihikiSonotaFuritsuke , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as sashihikiSonotaFuritsukeHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4010' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKihoKenpo , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKihoKenpoHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4020' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKaigoHoken , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKaigoHokenHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4030' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKoyoHoken , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKoyoHokenHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4040' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoRodoSaigaiHoken , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoRodoSaigaiHokenHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4050' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoTaisyokuKyufukinKyoshutsu , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4050' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoTaisyokuKyufukinKyoshutsuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4060' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKyosai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4060' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKyosaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5010' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKoseiNenkin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKoseiNenkinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5020' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKigyoNenkin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKigyoNenkinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5030' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuIchijikingaku , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuIchijikingakuHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5040' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuNenkin , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuNenkinHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5050' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoNenkinFutan , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5050' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoNenkinFutanHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5060' then M.KINGAKU end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKyosai , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5060' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKyosaiHaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6010' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin1 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin1HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6020' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin2 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin2HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6030' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin3 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin3HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6040' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin4 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin4HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7010' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin5 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin5HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7020' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin6 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin6HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7030' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin7 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7030' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin7HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7040' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin8 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7040' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin8HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8010' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin9 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8010' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin9HaitaCnt , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8020' then M.KINGAKU end) as yochokin10 , max(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8020' then M.HAITA_CNT end) as yochokin10HaitaCnt from DAC213_JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU N inner join DAA301_JINKENHI_RENDO_JOHO_MEISAI M on N.SHIKYUBI = M.SHIKYUBI and N.NYURYOKU_KBN = M.NYURYOKU_KBN and N.KYUYO_KBN = M.KYUYO_KBN and N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD = M.KYUYO_KASHO_CD and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD = M.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN = M.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN and N.GYOSHU_CD = M.GYOSHU_CD and N.SHOZOKU_CD = M.SHOZOKU_CD and M.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' where N.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' and N.SHIKYUBI = #{shikyubi} and N.NYURYOKU_KBN = #{nyuryokuKbnCd} and N.KYUYO_KBN = #{kyuyoKbnCd} and N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD = #{kyuyoKashoCd} and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD = #{kamokuBunruiCd} and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN = #{kamokuKbnCd} and N.GYOSHU_CD = #{gyoshuCd} and N.SHOZOKU_CD = #{shozokuCd} group by N.SHIKYUBI , N.NYURYOKU_KBN , N.KYUYO_KBN , N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN , N.GYOSHU_CD , N.SHOZOKU_CD FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

select N.SHIKYUBI as shikyubi , N.NYURYOKU_KBN as nyuryokuKbnCd , N.KYUYO_KBN as kyuyoKbnCd , N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD as kyuyoKashoCd , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD as kamokuBunruiCd , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN as kamokuKbnCd , N.GYOSHU_CD as gyoshuCd , N.SHOZOKU_CD as shozokuCd , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuKihonKyu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuSeikatsuhoshoKyu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuShokiKyu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuNinchiShoreiFu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1050' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuShokunoCateShoreiFu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1060' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoKinmu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1070' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuJidoTokubetsuKinmu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1080' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuTsukinkotsuHi , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1090' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuSonotaTeate , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '1100' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoShikyuZangyo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKenkoHokenryo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKaigoHokenryo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKoseiNenkinHokenryo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKoyoHokenryo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2050' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHoken , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2060' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoShotokuZei , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2070' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoJuminZei , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2080' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoShakaiHokenTaseiChu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2090' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKyosai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2100' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoRodoKumiai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2110' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoJutakuKashitsukekinHenkai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2120' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoTanshinfuninHiyo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2130' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoSenryoShohi , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2140' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoHonkaiJutakuKashitsukekinhenkai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2150' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoFukushiKikin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2160' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2170' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan1 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2180' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan2 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2190' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan3 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2200' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan4 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2210' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan5 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2220' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoZaisan6 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2230' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoGaibuZaisanKeiseiKakekin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2240' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoShoreikin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2250' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoKyuyoKashitsuke , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '2260' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kyuyoKojoSonotaKojoSub , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as sashihikiShiharaiGaku , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as sashihikiSonotaShiharai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as sashihikiFurikomiGaku , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '3040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as sashihikiSonotaFuritsuke , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKihoKenpo , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKaigoHoken , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKoyoHoken , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoRodoSaigaiHoken , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4050' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoTaisyokuKyufukinKyoshutsu , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '4060' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanKenpoHokenryoKyosai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKoseiNenkin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKigyoNenkin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuIchijikingaku , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoTaisyokuNenkin , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5050' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoNenkinFutan , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '5060' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as kaifutanNenkinHokenryoKyosai , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin1 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin2 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin3 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '6040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin4 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin5 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin6 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7030' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin7 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '7040' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin8 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8010' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin9 , sum(case when M.JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU_KOMOKU_CD = '8020' then M.KINGAKU else 0 end) as yochokin10 from DAC213_JINKENHI_JOHO_NYURYOKU N inner join DAA301_JINKENHI_RENDO_JOHO_MEISAI M on N.SHIKYUBI = M.SHIKYUBI and N.NYURYOKU_KBN = M.NYURYOKU_KBN and N.KYUYO_KBN = M.KYUYO_KBN and N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD = M.KYUYO_KASHO_CD and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD = M.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD and N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN = M.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN and N.GYOSHU_CD = M.GYOSHU_CD and N.SHOZOKU_CD = M.SHOZOKU_CD and M.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' where N.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' and N.SHIKYUBI = #{basicInputSearchDto.shikyubi} and N.NYURYOKU_KBN = #{basicInputSearchDto.listDetailNyuryokuKbnCd}
and (N.NYURYOKU_KBN, N.KYUYO_KBN, N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD, N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD, N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN, N.GYOSHU_CD, N.SHOZOKU_CD) in
(#{item.nyuryokuKbnCd}, #{item.kyuyoKbnCd}, #{item.kyuyoKashoCd}, #{item.kamokuBunruiCd}, #{item.kamokuKbnCd}, #{item.gyoshuCd}, #{item.shozokuCd})
group by N.SHIKYUBI , N.NYURYOKU_KBN , N.KYUYO_KBN , N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN , N.GYOSHU_CD , N.SHOZOKU_CD order by N.NYURYOKU_KBN asc , N.KYUYO_KBN asc , N.KYUYO_KASHO_CD asc , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_BUNRUI_CD asc , N.JINKENHI_KAMOKU_KBN asc , N.GYOSHU_CD asc , N.SHOZOKU_CD asc

select T.TORHKSK_CD as torhkskCd , T.TORHKSK_RYAKMEI_KJ as torhkskRyakmeiKj from V_AQA021_TORHKSK_MST T where T.SAKZYO_KBN = '${SAKZYO_KBN_YUKO}' and T.TORHKSK_CD = #{torhkskCd} and #{taishoDate} between T.TEKIYO_KAISHIBI and T.TEKIYO_SHURYOBI FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
